name: io.github.diegolopez0208/rpgmaker-mv-ultimate
description: MCP server for RPG Maker MV project management. 12 consolidated tools for actors, classes, skills, items, weapons, armors, enemies, states, troops, maps, events, tilesets, animations, system settings, AI vision analysis, procedural map generation with 21 themes, and 106 bundled map templates. v4 tool names remain callable.

environmentVariables.name: RPGMAKER_PROJECT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to your RPG Maker MV project

environmentVariables.name: VISION_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible Vision API (optional)

environmentVariables.name: VISION_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model name for Vision API (optional, defaults to meta/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct)
